description: Tcl/Tk 8.6 runtime (BAWT Batteries-Included build) - Tcl/Tk core plus extensions (Tktable, BWidget, Img, ...) used by SICStus-based tools such as ProB's Tcl/Tk GUI
notes: Provides tcl86.dll / tk86.dll plus Tcl/Tk extensions (Tktable, etc.) and sets
SP_TCL_DSO / SP_TK_DSO so SICStus-based tools (e.g. ProB's ProBWin GUI) can load
Tcl/Tk. Open a new terminal or re-login after install for the env vars to take effect.
Pinned to the Tcl/Tk 8.6 line - do NOT move to 9.0 (SICStus 4.8 needs 8.6).
